name: debug-intelligence
description: Comprehensive debugging and root cause analysis with systematic problem-solving
instructions: Capture the exact symptom: error, failing test, or unexpected behavior
Reproduce the issue with the smallest deterministic repro before editing
Form 1-3 plausible hypotheses based on evidence, test one at a time
Apply the smallest verified fix — avoid unrelated cleanup
Verify twice: narrowest reproducer first, then broader regression check
